generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor accepting current input and outputting torque"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component transforming rotational energy and torque within the drive train"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component transforming rotational energy and torque within the drive train"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentSensorData
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance OutputAngleSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from motor constants and measured input current",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, InputCurrentSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived velocity from motor encoder data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, InputCurrentSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of simulated versus measured data in a unified dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction compensation for robot control algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection from deviation between simulated and measured data"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms based on friction compensation for improved motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, InputCurrentSensor, OutputAngleSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization between physical system and digital shadow, with continuous live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streams via MQTT, digital shadow model (data traces, processing components, engineering/simulation models), and dashboard for unified monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), utilizing live data during robot operation for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to assess friction model accuracy; white-box and black-box model integration for multi-physics-aware identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset description and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
